title: The Faroe Islands Are Changing Some of Europe’s Strictest Abortion Rules
summary_full: A new law allowing abortion up to 12 weeks will be a major shift in an archipelago of 55,000 people, and there are strong feelings on both sides.
summary_public: A new law allowing abortion up to 12 weeks will be a major shift in an archipelago of 55,000 people, and there are strong feelings on both sides.
